rationale: Both reviews identify the same material scope problem confirmed in the diff: `IsUnipotent`, `ReductiveGroup`, and `SemisimpleGroup` are premature placeholder/high-layer definitions, so acting on either would remove the main bad scope. Review 2's extra `AffineAlgGroup` splitting demand depends on an external roadmap claim not present in the diff and is at least contested from the shown file, so it is not decisive.
